title: (JAPM) Just Another Performance Modpack
description: This is just like every other performance modpack, or is it?
body:
This Modpack is almost like every other but with the catch of being able to elevate the realism to a whole other level, with mods like bobby do get that huge render distance, sodium & co for the ultimate performance, iris for the stunning shaders and many more

Dont want to close the game just to install resourcepacks, datapacks or shaderpacks, with resourcify you can do it ingame

Have a Crappy laptop which is worse than a potato use this modpack to get the most out of your device.

This Modpack feutures not just extreme performance improvements but also some other essential features that many people like
